_comment: SCORED profile A2 — Group A clean happy path. Simple managed, two flat-fee owners, split payment, no direct channel (S5 not surfaced). Serialized verbatim from docs/planning-artifacts/poc-respondent-specs-2026-06-02.md (v1.2-frozen) §Group A / A2.

facts.pain: Keeping owners happy with transparent reports.

persona: Organized and professional. Has managed properties before and knows the vocabulary ('management fee,' 'flat fee,' 'owner statement'). Provides owner details in one go when asked (doesn't need follow-up per owner). Confirms echo-backs promptly. No advice-seeking. Does not mention a website → S5 should not surface.

answer_key.payment_split: recorded:50/50 — second 50% due 7 days before arrival
answer_key.teammates: recorded:1 teammate — Alex Rivera, viewer, all listings
answer_key.pain: recorded:Keeping owners happy with transparent reports.

_note: S5 NOT surfaced (no direct channel). owners aggregate recorded:2_owners; per-owner economics (flat_fee $200/$150) are recorded + flag_for_call_1 in spec. decision_owner derived shared from presence of teammate (VA). channels normalized to canonical schema enum 'booking' (spec v1.3).
